knowledge.content: Commission structure: 2% on bookings up to ₹50L, 2.5% on ₹50L-₹1Cr, 3% above ₹1Cr. Paid within 15 days of booking confirmation.
Partnership terms: Minimum 5 deals per quarter to maintain active status. Exclusive territory rights available for top performers.
Registration process: Submit RERA certificate, PAN, GST, and bank details. Approval within 48 hours. Digital onboarding available.
Referral policy: Earn 0.5% on secondary referrals. Partner portal provides real-time tracking of leads and commission status.
Quarterly incentives: ₹50K bonus for 10+ deals, ₹1L for 20+ deals. Annual top performer gets international trip and 0.5% extra commission.
